text:
Rusty Honesty is the 4th character image song for the Attack on Titan anime. It is the character image song of Jean Kirschtein, and is sung by his voice actor, .

The song prominently features the guitar riff from DOA. 

The song was composed by both Kohta Yamamoto and , and arranged solely by Yamamoto.
